name: Shanshan Brand Management Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanshan Brand Management Co., Ltd. engages in the design, marketing, and sale of formal and casual business menswear in the People's Republic of China. The company primarily offers its products under the Firs, Shanshan, and Lubiam brand names. As of December 31, 2019, it had 1,280 retail outlets operated by its distributors and franchisees, as well as self-operated. The company is also involved in the sub-licensing of trademark. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Ningbo, the People's Republic of China. Shanshan Brand Management Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Ningbo Shanshan Co., Ltd.
